Aug 14, 2025

Intensive English Program with Rowan University by Doğuş University

Doğuş University offers a 4-week Intensive English Program in cooperation with Rowan University. The program enhances academic language skills and provides on-campus accommodation and a Rowan University certificate for a unique study-abroad experience.

Oct 04, 2022

University students launch project to clean up sea surfaces

University students are collecting floating waste with a sea surface cleaning vehicle they developed. The prototype vehicle, with a 50-liter waste capacity, can clean an area of 86 square meters per hour.

Honorary President of ECTI-CON 2022 Prof. Dr. Shahram Minaeİ

The countdown has already begun for the international conference ECTI-CON 2022 organized by our university in partnership with Kasetsart University (Thailand) and organized by Thailand's "Electrical Engineering/Electronics, Computer, Telecommunication and Information Technology (ECTI) Association".

Dec 07, 2020

Prof. Dr. Shahram Minaei ranked in Stanford University study of the world's top 2% of scientists.

A study conducted by Stanford University recognized Prof. Dr. Shahram Minaei from Dogus University, Department of Electronics and Communications Engineering, as World's Top 2% Scientists. Looking at several indicators, this study analyzed data from 1996 through 2019, covering approximately 7 million scientists in 22 major fields ranging from chemistry to engineering to economics and business.

Doğuş University Sailing Team Won Many Awards In The International Presidential Yacht Race

Doğuş University Sailing Team has completed the International Presidential Yacht Race as the winner of three respectable cups; Republic Cup, Blue Homeland Cup, and Barbaros Hayrettin Cup.

Doğuş University students are the winners  of Red Bull Basement, Turkey with Plantric Project

The results of the “Red Bull Basement” program, which supports young entrepreneurs interested in technology worldwide, have been announced. Dogus University students from Turkey Aylin Printer and Can Zenginel won the right to develop initiatives in the international arena with “Plantric” initiative.

TÜBİTAK and French Ministry of Foreign Affairs Bosphorus Joint Project Call Concluded

Among the projects decided to be supported, Doğuş University Dr. Faculty Member Emel Önal Dumanoğlu also has a project.TÜBİTAK and French Ministry of Foreign Affairs Bosphorus Joint Project Call Concluded.

The Winner of Nature Contest 2020 Turkey is Batu Hatipoğlu with the Project ‘Helicopter Inspired From A Bee’

‘Helicopter Inspired From A Bee’ was chosen as the best Project among the possible applications in Turkey for the worldwide held ‘Nature Contest Competition’.

Contribution To Defense Industry From Doğuş University

Nanotechnology which is accepted as one of the most important future Technologies has already started to appear in products used in Daily life. Nanoscience and Nanotechnology studies which also take an important place in defense industry that the World countries invest on most together with such sectors as medicine, electronics, textile, automotive, has continued by accelerating day by day.
